description: Learn how to roast vegetables and proteins to perfection.

steps.instruction: Prepare your ingredients: vegetables or proteins, oil, and seasonings.
Cut ingredients into even pieces for uniform cooking.
Toss ingredients with oil and seasonings in a bowl.
Spread the ingredients out on a baking sheet in a single layer.
Roast in the oven for 20-30 minutes, stirring halfway through.
Check for doneness and serve hot.
